facts.claim: Huatulco, formally Bahías de Huatulco, centered on the town of La Crucecita, is a tourist development in Mexico.
Huatulco's tourism industry is centered on its nine bays, thus the name Bahías de Huatulco, but has since been unofficially shortened to simply Huatulco.
The Camino Real Zaashila, Quinta Real Huatulco, Las Brisas, Dreams Resort & Spa, and the Barceló are examples of the most popular larger resorts in the area.
